caption: The video appears to be an educational or informational piece produced and edited by MIEMSS Media Services in collaboration with the University of Maryland Department of Surgery and the R Adams Cowley Shock Trauma Center. The scene features a medical professional, likely a doctor, dressed in pink scrubs and a white lab coat, seated in what seems to be a hospital or medical facility setting. The individual is resting their head on one hand, possibly indicating fatigue or contemplation. The background includes a desk and some medical equipment, reinforcing the clinical environment. A QR code and contact information for "Ibuchanan@som.umaryland.edu" are displayed, suggesting that viewers can access additional resources or contact the producer for more information. The overall tone of the video suggests a focus on healthcare education or awareness.
